Slide Feedback
Claude
Hi! Fill in the brief on the left and click Plan Deck. I'll map your outline to a slide-by-slide plan, then we'll build each slide together — you review, give feedback, and approve one at a time.
💡 tips
🖼 Image Library
Upload images → assign to template slots → baked into exported .gs
☁️
Click or drag images to upload to Cloudinary
JPG, PNG, WebP — uploads to your lb-deck folder
Uploaded Images — click to assign to a template slot key
Slot Key → Image URL Assignments
These assignments are saved in your session file and baked into the exported .gs script.
Assign to slot key:
Export Google Apps Script
Copy this script into your Apps Script editor, then run buildDeck().
